ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., quarterback, running back, wide receiver, tight end) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6-2) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "college" TEXT /* College of the player */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the player started their professional career */,
  "jersey_number" TEXT /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, retired, injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the game */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the game */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the game was played */,
  "receiving_rec" INTEGER /* Number of receptions by the player */,
  "receiving_tgt" INTEGER /* Number of targets the player received */,
  "receiving_yds" INTEGER /* Receiving yards by the player */,
  "receiving_avg" REAL /* Receiving average of the player */,
  "receiving_long" INTEGER /* Longest reception by the player */,
  "receiving_20p" INTEGER /* Number of 20+ yard receptions by the player */,
  "receiving_td" INTEGER /* Number of receiving touchdowns by the player */,
  "rushing_att" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts by the player */,
  "rushing_yds" INTEGER /* Rushing yards by the player */,
  "rushing_td" INTEGER /* Number of rushing touchdowns by the player */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent_team" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home/away) */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win/loss/tie) */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Fantasy points earned in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_points" (
  "fantasy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy points entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which the fantasy points were earned */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Total fantasy points earned by the player */,
  "fantasy_points_per_game" REAL /* Fantasy points per game earned by the player */,
  "fantasy_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fantasy team that owns the player */,
  "week_points" REAL /* Fantasy points earned in the week */,
  "season_points" REAL /* Total fantasy points earned in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_points_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_points_fantasy_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("fantasy_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coach */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player on the roster */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is on */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the roster entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the roster entry was made */,
  "lst" INTEGER /* Roster status of the player (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "games" INTEGER /* Number of games the player has played */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., QB, RB, WR, TE) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Roster status of the player (e.g., active, bench, injured) */,
  "fantasy_position" TEXT /* Position in the fantasy lineup (e.g., QB, RB1, WR1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was injured */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected date of return from injury */,
  "rehab_status" TEXT /* Status of the player's rehabilitation (e.g., in rehab, cleared for practice) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was suspended */,
  "suspension_date" TEXT /* Date the suspension occurred */,
  "suspension_description" TEXT /* Description of the suspension */,
  "suspension_status" TEXT /* Status of the suspension (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "expected_end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the suspension */,
  "appeal_status" TEXT /* Status of any appeal (e.g., pending, denied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspensions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fantasy team owner, league administrator, platform manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
